prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about metastasis basics.
Context visual: Metastasis is how cancer spreads from one part of the body to another. But how does that happen?
Escalation visual: It starts when cancer cells break away from a tumor. They then enter the bloodstream or lymphatic system!
